✦ Your Dream Team

Meet Charissa & Tatiana

Two Disney-certified travel concierges dedicated to planning your perfect vacation — at absolutely no cost to you.

Charissa
✦ Travel Concierge · Top Producer 2025 ✦

A 2025 Top Producer for Share The Magic Travel Co., Charissa brings first-hand expertise across every Disney destination, Royal Caribbean, and luxury all-inclusive resorts. She's been behind the scenes at the "Happiest Retreat on Earth" and she's here to make your vacation just as extraordinary.

Walt Disney World Disneyland Disney Cruise Line Royal Caribbean Sandals Resorts
Tatiana
✦ Travel Concierge · Disney Specialist ✦

With a flair for luxury and an eye for the extraordinary, Tatiana specializes in creating unforgettable magical experiences — from romantic Caribbean escapes to immersive Disney adventures. Her passion for travel shines in every perfectly crafted itinerary she builds.

Aulani Hawaii Adventures by Disney Sandals & Beaches Luxury Resorts Honeymoons

✦ Simple Process

How It Works

Three easy steps to your most magical vacation ever — all completely free.

1
💬
Tell Us Your Dream

Fill out our quick form or take the personality quiz. Share your destination wishlist, travel dates, group size, and budget. The more you tell us, the more magical we can make it.

2
🗺️
We Build Your Trip

Charissa or Tatiana personally designs your custom itinerary — resort selection, dining reservations, park strategies, excursions, and every detail handled. You hear back within 24 hours.

3
🎉
Pack & Go Make Magic

We monitor deals after booking and rebook if a better rate drops. We are available throughout your trip for any needs. You just show up and create memories — we handle everything else.

✦ Disney Character Edition

Which Disney Character
Are You Most Like?

Fun facts about your favorite characters — and a little magic about what they reveal about YOU as a traveler!

01
🐭

Mickey Mouse — The Optimist

Fun Fact: Mickey's original name was "Mortimer" — Walt's wife Lillian talked him out of it! If Mickey's your character, you're a glass-half-full person who finds magic everywhere — you'll love Walt Disney World's Magic Kingdom.

02
👸

Cinderella — The Dreamer

Fun Fact: There's a secret suite inside Cinderella's Castle — you can't book it, only win it! Cinderella travelers dream big and love luxury. You'd adore the Grand Floridian Resort and Disney's Princess dining experiences.

03
🧭

Moana — The Explorer

Fun Fact: Moana took over 200 animators 4 years to create, with authentic Polynesian cultural research. Moana travelers crave discovery. You're destined for Aulani in Hawaii or Adventures by Disney across the globe.

04
🌹

Belle — The Romantic

Fun Fact: Be Our Guest Restaurant in Magic Kingdom was the first place in all of Disney World to serve alcohol! Belle travelers are hopeless romantics — a Sandals overwater bungalow in St. Lucia has your name on it.

05
🦁

Simba — The Family Leader

Fun Fact: Disney's Animal Kingdom is nearly 5 times the size of Magic Kingdom! Simba travelers put family first. Disney's Animal Kingdom Lodge with savanna views — or a Disney Cruise — is your perfect match.

06
🧜‍♀️

Ariel — The Adventurer

Fun Fact: Ariel has over 10,000 individually painted scales in her computer-animated form! Ariel travelers are drawn to the sea. Royal Caribbean or a Disney Cruise — you belong where the ocean breeze meets nonstop adventure.

✦ Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

Is your planning service really free? +
Yes — 100% free, always. Charissa and Tatiana are compensated directly by Disney, Royal Caribbean, Sandals, and other resort partners when you book. You pay exactly the same price as booking directly (often less, because we have access to exclusive promotions). There are absolutely no added fees, service charges, or hidden costs — ever.
How is this different from booking myself online? +
When you book yourself, you get a reservation. When Charissa and Tatiana book for you, you get a curated experience. They know which resorts, room categories, dining experiences, and add-ons are actually worth it. They also actively monitor for price drops and promotions after you book — and rebook you automatically if a better deal becomes available. Our clients regularly save hundreds of dollars.
What destinations do you specialize in? +
Our specialty destinations include Walt Disney World, Disneyland, Disney Cruise Line, Aulani (Disney Hawaii), Adventures by Disney, Royal Caribbean, Sandals & Beaches Resorts, and Universal Orlando. Both Charissa and Tatiana are Disney College of Knowledge Certified and have first-hand experience at every destination they book.
How far in advance should I start planning? +
The earlier the better! For Disney World, we recommend at least 6-12 months out so we can secure the best resort rooms, dining reservations (which open 60 days in advance), and any special experiences. For cruises, 6-12 months is also ideal. That said, we can often work magic on shorter timelines — reach out regardless of your travel window.
Do you help with flights and transportation too? +
We focus primarily on resort and cruise bookings, dining, and experience planning — where we have the most buying power and expertise to save you money. For flights, we provide guidance and recommendations on timing and options. We are always available to answer any logistics questions throughout your planning process.
What if I need to cancel or change my trip? +
We handle all changes and modifications for you. Disney and most resort partners have flexible cancellation policies, and Charissa and Tatiana will guide you through every option. We are with you from the initial booking all the way through your return home — including any unexpected changes along the way.

Still have questions? We answer within 24 hours.
